text.cn: 頭開始轟鳴。布達拉宮在遠處，氧氣瓶在近處。你的簽證與入藏手續若有問題，遊戲早該遣返你了——現在是身體問題。
text.en: Your head pounds. Potala is far; oxygen is near. Visa/permit issues would have deported you already — this is your body talking.

text.cn: 買氧氣瓶 + 旅館躺平一天。
text.en: Buy oxygen + flat-line in a hotel for a day.
Sightsee slowly nearby; no hero climbs.

text.cn: 硬衝布達拉宮參觀（風險：更暈）。
text.en: Push to Potala anyway (risk: worse dizziness).

text.cn: 高原教會你：旅行有時是和重力談判。
text.en: Altitude teaches: travel is sometimes a negotiation with gravity.
